*Envive Care Conference Review - V 4.0
Wound Status: Arterial to Right lower extremity / Measures 0.7 cm x 2.0 cm / Stage: N/A
Drainage present - serous, light. No odor noted. Treatment: Foam dressing change daily.
Wound note - Rightlowerex. Meas 0.7x2.0x0.7cm. Light serosang drainage, no odor. Wound bed 80% gran, 20% slough. Periwound macerated. Alginate dsg applied. Pt tolerated well. Dr. Nakamura notified.
